description_long: This is a luxury wristwatch featuring a round, gold-toned metal case with a polished finish and a prominent crown and pushers on the right side. The dial is silver with gold hour markers and hands, and includes two subdials, likely for chronograph or additional timekeeping functions. The watch face is protected by a clear glass or crystal cover, and the brand logo is positioned just below the 12 o'clock marker. The strap is black, textured to resemble leather or alligator skin, and is attached to the case with visible lugs. The underside of the strap appears to be a lighter, natural leather color, and the clasp is a traditional buckle style. This timepiece combines elegant materials and a sophisticated design, making it suitable for formal urban settings.
description: A gold-toned luxury wristwatch with a silver dial, gold markers, and a black textured leather strap. Features include subdials, a polished case, and a classic buckle clasp.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold case, silver dial with gold markers, subdials, and the brand logo below 12 o'clock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the gold case, the crown, and pushers on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black textured strap and the gold clasp, with the case partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and the attachment of the strap to the lugs.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, stylized emblem or crest is visible just below the 12 o'clock marker on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is silver with gold stick indices for hour markers, two subdials symmetrically placed, and gold hands. The design is chronograph style, with a clean, elegant layout and a polished finish.
attribute_strap_type: Black textured leather strap with a natural leather underside, classic stitched construction.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three gold hands (hour, minute, second) and two subdials, no visible date window or luminous elements.
